changes.description: Initial release with core voice relay functionality
Add chat mode for bidirectional messaging
Use WebSocket for AI session communication
Dynamic display lines based on kiosk screen size
Collapsible sidebar drawer, QR modal, and mobile-optimized kiosk
Forward messages from all devices to AI
Add database migration system for SQLite storage
Add GitHub OAuth authentication
Phase 3 - Workspaces Implementation
Scope device registry and WebSocket per workspace
Add auth UI and dashboard for workspace management
Add device token persistence, session tracking & UX polish
Scope messages to sessions
Replace Dashboard with Workspace Home
Session view with auto-detect mode, QR idle state
Add QR code session join with auto-join workspace
Add signed, time-limited QR tokens for session access control
Exit kiosk mode navigates to workspace home
Auto-register first device when creating default workspace
Add workspace settings for OpenHands API key
Add automatic rollback and issue filing on smoke test failure
Fixed height kiosk layout with scrollable sidebar
Position QR button and AI status inside kiosk display area
Simplify device modes to mobile and kiosk
Register device before adding to session
